untranslatable_reason: This signal requires multi-leg spread trading logic (3 crude oil contracts paired with 2 gasoline + 1 heating oil contracts with forward price quotes 1 month offset). The backtest engine does not support: (1) multi-leg/spread position sizing across multiple instruments, (2) calendar spread logic (pairing different contract months), (3) relative pricing logic between crude and refined products with time-lag adjustments, (4) simultaneous entry/exit coordination across 3 different commodities. Standard single-instrument indicators cannot express the refining cycle arbitrage relationship or the 3-2-1 ratio hedge requirement.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is a crude oil crack spread strategy requiring simultaneous positions in 3 different commodity contracts with forward price relationships. This requires a dedicated spread/multi-leg order type not available in standard single-instrument backtest engines. Placeholder conditions added to show structure, but strategy cannot be properly backtested without spread trading support.
